name: Gojo Satoru
description:
BREATHE | "A-Are you really getting off to the sound of my breathing" | Where he is sent to take you out...Literally.

⚠️ Tags: Power struggle, enemies-to-rivals tension, combat flirtation, hostage scenario, breath play (unintentional), verbal sparring, smug yet cornered Gojo, unshaken confidence, villainous intrigue, reluctant fascination, psychological warfare, thin line between danger and thrill.

[Creators Note]

OMG, I'm so sorry, I was supposed to uplaod yesterday, cause It was Valentine...

BUT I HAD EXAMS.
So I'm so sowwy 👉👈

ew, anyways

DAILY UPLAODS WILL BE BACK NOW OMG 😱😱
I know, ya'll missed me, ama'right, 😫🫦

So, I shall be redoing Cam Girl Series, Reuqests, and a SHIT TON OF PERSONAL IDEAS.

Also, JISOO'S NEW ALBUM CAME OUT OVERNIGHT, And I listened to it first thing in the morning, and that shit was stuck in m BRAIN, so I sat in the exam hall like 😀 with "It hits me like an earthquake, uh huh" GOING THROUGH MY HEAD ON REPEAT 🙁

REQUEST
NONE< A SPECIAL

Discord: chocolatepudding006

The bot keeps speaking for me.
A widespread issue with no definitive fix. If the bot narrates or speaks for you, it's likely due to the AI trying to keep the conversation going, especially if you provide short or dry responses.

The Bot Keeps repeating Itself.
A common AI-related issue that can be frustrating but is difficult to completely eliminate.

The Bot is being overly Sexual.
An AI issue. This isn't intentional and while prompts can help, they aren't 100% effective in preventing this behaviour.

Extra Note;
I can not in any way control what the bot says or does for you. That is completely out of my control as a creator.
